backward_compatibility.rationale: New column on yengo-content.db is additive. Existing entries get NULL collection_slug. No existing frontend behavior changes for single-source collections.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: No old code to remove. This is new functionality.

option_selection.rationale: Simplest approach: add collection_slug to content DB, detect collisions at ingest via SQL, create editions at publish via GROUP BY. No config fields, no richness scoring, no type-based branching. Works for all collection types.
